description: Move the revision out of the ~19 entity slots -> pure value stores (key->value). Fact system holds revision per FactKey, set from reconcile's returned 64-bit, propagate on rev!=prior. Retire contributions/join/FactValue::Presence(u64) (single-authority confirmed). Blanket Reconcile for the ~12 mechanical PartialEq facts. Readers (code_revision/function_defined_revision/...) read the fact-system revision.
title: Fact system owns/threads the 64-bit revision; strip revision from slots; retire join
